daily.baseball_pulse:
MY TEAM

There is no relevant news for your roster today.

MY PROSPECTS

No prospect news today.

AROUND THE LEAGUE

Wyatt Langford lands on the Rangers injured list with a flexor strain, removing a promising young bat from Texas's lineup. Jackson Holliday is undergoing an MRI for continued hand discomfort, potentially affecting Baltimore's offensive depth. J.T. Realmuto was placed on the injured list, creating catching opportunity for Philadelphia. Denzel Clarke goes on the A's injured list, while Austin Slater was designated for assignment by Miami. The Braves called up JR Ritchie to make his MLB debut Thursday and selected Carlos Carrasco to bolster their rotation. Francisco Lindor exited the Mets game early with left calf tightness and will undergo an MRI. Blake Snell threw 32 pitches in a rehab start for the Dodgers as he works back from shoulder issues.

BASEBALL TODAY

Shohei Ohtani continues his dominant pitching season with six shutout innings and a 0.38 ERA through 24 innings, though the Dodgers fell 3-0 to the Giants. Ildemaro Vargas is on fire for Arizona, extending his hitting streak to 21 games with two home runs and five total hits to lead the Diamondbacks past the White Sox. Munetaka Murakami tied the MLB rookie record by homering in his fifth consecutive game.
